---
title: "pencairan kredit"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
# 1. import library
library(tidyverse) 
library(tsibble) 
library(timetk) 
library(imputeTS) 
library(lubridate) 
library(forecast) 
library(tseries) 
library(scales) 
library(prophet) 
library(rstan) 
library(readxl) 
library(aTSA) 
```

```{r}
# 2. import data
data_pencairan_kredit <- read_excel("C:\\PROJECT SENDIRI\\Dataset\\Data_Pencairan_kredit.xlsx") 
data_pencairan_kredit <- data_pencairan_kredit[, -1] 
```

```{r}
# 3. Ubah Menjadi Objek Time Series 
ts_data_kredit <- ts(data_pencairan_kredit, start = c(2022, 2), frequency = 12)
```

```{r}
# 4. Plot Data Awal 
autoplot(ts_data_kredit, main = "Data Pencairan Kredit (2022 - 
2031)", ylab = "Dana Pencairan", xlab = "Tahun")
```

```{r}
# 5. Uji Stasioneritas 
# ADF Test 
adf.test(ts_data_kredit) 
 
# ACF dan PACF 
acf(ts_data_kredit, main = "ACF Test Data Time Series") 
pacf(ts_data_kredit, main = "PACF Test Data Time Series")
```

```{r}
# 6. Model ARIMA 
auto_ar <- auto.arima(ts_data_kredit, seasonal = FALSE) 

# Forecast
forecast_usage <- forecast::forecast(auto_ar, h = 12)

# Plotting
autoplot(forecast_usage, main = "Hasil Prediksi ARIMA 12 Bulan ke Depan")
```


```{r}
# 7. Model ETS 
ets_model <- ets(ts_data_kredit) 
summary(ets_model) 
checkresiduals(ets_model) 
```

```{r}
# Forecast ETS 
forecast_ets <- forecast::forecast(ets_model, h = 12) 
autoplot(forecast_ets, main = "Hasil Prediksi ETS") 
print(forecast_ets)
```

```{r}
# 8. Identifikasi dan Imputasi Outlier 
nilai_kredit_asli <- as.numeric(ts_data_kredit) 
ambang_batas <- 2.5e+07 
 
nilai_kredit_na <- ifelse( 
  nilai_kredit_asli > ambang_batas, 
  NA, 
  nilai_kredit_asli 
) 
 
cat("Jumlah Outlier yang diubah menjadi NA:", 
sum(is.na(nilai_kredit_na)), "\n") 
 
# Imputasi Moving Average (k = 5) 
ts_imputasi <- ts(nilai_kredit_na, start = start(ts_data_kredit), 
frequency = frequency(ts_data_kredit)) 
ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi <- na_ma(ts_imputasi, k = 5, weighting = 
"simple") 
```


```{r}
# 9. Visualisasi Hasil Imputasi 
plot_df <- data.frame( 
  Tanggal = time(ts_data_kredit), 
  Original = as.numeric(ts_data_kredit), 
  Imputed = as.numeric(ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi) 
) 
 
plot_df %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Original, Imputed), names_to = "JenisData", 
values_to = "Nilai") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Tanggal, y = Nilai, color = JenisData)) + 
  geom_line(alpha = 0.8) + 
  labs(title = "Perbandingan Data Asli vs Setelah Diimputasi", 
       y = "Jumlah Kredit (Rp)", x = "Waktu") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar(prefix = "Rp ")) + theme_minimal() + scale_color_manual(values = c("Original" = "red", "Imputed" = "blue"))
```

```{r}
# 10. Uji dan Model Setelah Imputasi 
# ADF Test 
adf.test(ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi) 
 
# ARIMA Baru 
auto_ar_imputed <- auto.arima(ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi,seasonal = FALSE) 
summary(auto_ar_imputed) 
 
forecast_arima_baru <- forecast::forecast(auto_ar_imputed, h = 12) 
plot(forecast_arima_baru, main = "Forecast ARIMA Data Bersih") 
print(forecast_arima_baru) 
 
# ETS Baru 
ets_model_baru <- ets(ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi) 
summary(ets_model_baru) 
 
forecast_ets_baru <- forecast::forecast(ets_model_baru, h = 12)
plot(forecast_ets_baru, main = "Forecast ETS dari Data Bersih")
print(forecast_ets_baru) 
```

```{r}
# 11. Siapkan Data untuk Prophet 
df_prophet <- data.frame( 
  Tanggal = time(ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi), 
  Nilai = as.numeric(ts_nilai_kredit_imputasi) 
) 
 
# Ubah Tanggal ke Format Date 
df_prophet$Tanggal <- as.Date(paste(floor(df_prophet$Tanggal),
                                    round((df_prophet$Tanggal - floor(df_prophet$Tanggal)) * 12 + 1), 
                                    "01", sep = "-"), format = "%Y-%m-%d") 
 
# Ubah Nama Kolom 
df_prophet_akhir <- df_prophet %>% rename(ds = Tanggal, y = Nilai)
```

```{r}
# 12. Model dan Forecast Prophet 
m <- prophet() 
m <- fit.prophet(m, df_prophet_akhir) 
 
# Forecast 
forecast_prophet <- make_future_dataframe(m, periods = 12, freq = 
"month") 
prophet_fore <- predict(m, forecast_prophet) 
 
# Plot Hasil Forecast 
plot(m, prophet_fore) 
prophet_plot_components(m, prophet_fore)
```

```{r}
# 13. Evaluasi Model Prophet 
# Prediksi pada data training 
df_prophet_train_pred <- predict(m, df_prophet_akhir) 
 
# Gabungkan hasil 
df_prophet_metrics <- df_prophet_akhir %>% 
  left_join(df_prophet_train_pred %>% select(ds, yhat), by = "ds") %>% filter(!is.na(yhat)) 
 
# Hitung metrik error 
rmse_prophet <- sqrt(mean((df_prophet_metrics$y - 
df_prophet_metrics$yhat)^2)) 
mae_prophet <- mean(abs(df_prophet_metrics$y - 
df_prophet_metrics$yhat)) 
mape_prophet <- mean(abs((df_prophet_metrics$y - 
df_prophet_metrics$yhat) / 
df_prophet_metrics$y[df_prophet_metrics$y 
!= 0])) * 100 
cat("RMSE Prophet:", rmse_prophet, "\n") 
cat("MAE Prophet:", mae_prophet, "\n") 
cat("MAPE Prophet:", mape_prophet, "%\n") 
```
